task_description: Write a customer response email to a SaaS customer who is frustrated about repeated billing errors on their enterprise account.

input_data.issue: Customer has been double-charged for the past 3 months despite raising tickets each time. The latest charge was $4,500 instead of the correct $2,250.
input_data.previous_interactions: 3 previous support tickets, each resolved with a refund but the root issue keeps recurring.
